headline: Digital Marketing & Content Creator

experience.description:
Content Marketing Executive tại Creative Hub Agency (2024 - 2025)
Lên kịch bản nội dung và tối ưu hiệu quả chiến dịch quảng cáo Facebook, Google cho đối tác.

summary: Hồ sơ được tạo tự động từ liên kết Google.

headline: Software Engineer
address: Hoa Chau, Hoa Vang, Da Nang
summary: Third-year Information Technology student with skills in Java Core, Spring Boot, Flutter, Dart, HTML, and CSS. Passionate about building scalable web and mobile applications, with the ambition to become a professional full-stack developer.

experience.description:
Backend Developer tại VETAU - Railway Ticket Booking System (Personal Project) (2024 - 2024)
Responsible for developing the backend. Built and maintained RESTful APIs for user management, train schedules, and ticket booking. Implemented JWT authentication and password hashing to ensure secure login and session management. Collaborated with frontend developers to design clean API contracts and debug integration issues. Followed clean architecture principles and applied best practices in error handling and security.

education.school: Software Engineering — The University of Science and Technology - The University of Danang (DUT) (GPA: 3.4/4.0)

headline: Software Engineer
summary: Software Engineer tận tâm, giàu tinh thần học hỏi và đam mê xây dựng hệ thống phần mềm ổn định, dễ mở rộng. Luôn chủ động cập nhật công nghệ mới, làm việc hiệu quả trong môi trường teamwork và chủ động tìm kiếm giải pháp sáng tạo.
skills: Tiếng Việt - Bản địa hoặc song ngữ

experience.description:
Thực tập sinh Software Engineering tại FPT Software (2022 - 2022)
Tham gia phát triển tính năng mới giúp giảm thời gian tải trang của ứng dụng khách hàng 15%
Phối hợp cùng team Agile để triển khai API chia sẻ dữ liệu
Viết test tự động, tăng độ bao phủ code từ 65% lên 90%

Trợ lý nghiên cứu đại học tại Viện Công nghệ thông tin Việt Nam (2021 - 2021)
Hỗ trợ phát triển thuật toán computer vision cho thiết bị đeo thông minh
Phân tích dữ liệu lớn nhằm tăng độ chính xác của mô hình nhận diện chuyển động thêm 18%

education.school: — Khoa học máy tính — Đại học Bách Khoa Hà Nội (GPA: 3.8/4.0)

headline: SOFTWARE ENGINEER
summary: A fourth-year Information Technology student with skills in React.js, Node.js, HTML, and CSS. Passionate about building scalable web applications and aspiring to become a professional full-stack developer.

experience.description:
Frontend Developer tại  (2024 - 2024)
VACCINATION SUPPORT WEB APPLICATION FOR PREVENTIVE HEALTH CENTERS: Developed the user interface of a vaccine registration and management platform using React.js. Implemented core features such as user registration, personal vaccination profile management, vaccine information lookup, and appointment booking at health centers. Built intuitive interfaces for health staff to track vaccine inventory and manage expiration status. Designed and implemented dynamic vaccination scheduling logic. Collaborated closely with the backend team (NestJS, MySQL) to integrate APIs and ensure consistent data flow across the system.

Developer tại  (2024 - nay)
TASK MANAGER WEB APP: Designed and built a full-stack task management web application using React (Vite), Tailwind CSS, and Node.js with Express & MongoDB. Implemented secure user authentication and authorization using JWT and protected routes with frontend route guards and backend middleware. Developed robust CRUD functionality for task operations, with features such as status toggling, due date tracking, and input validation. Integrated task statistics dashboard, auto-overdue detection, and smart filtering. Designed and enforced scalable backend architecture with modular controllers, middleware, and model relationships.

Developer tại  ( - nay)
TAP IN ORDER: Developed a mini–game using React.js where players must tap numbered points in ascending order without mistakes. Built responsive game UI with smooth animations for correct selections and game–over events. Implemented auto–play mode, dynamic point generation, and collision–free position rendering within the game area. Managed scalable gameplay logic: supports high point counts while ensuring all point nodes remain visible and interactable. Optimized performance.

education.school: Software Engineering — The University of Science and Technology – The University of Danang (DUT)

Developed the user interface of a vaccine registration and management

Implemented core features such as user registration, personal vaccination

Built intuitive interfaces for health staff to track vaccine inventory and

Designed and implemented dynamic vaccination scheduling logic:

appointments accordingly.
Collaborated closely with the backend team (NestJS, MySQL) to integrate
APIs and ensure consistent data flow across the system.
VACCINATION SUPPORT WEB APPLICATION FOR PREVENTIVE
HEALTH CENTERS (10/2024 – 12/2024)
Role: Frontend Developer (Team Project - 2 Member)
TASK MANAGER WEB APP (6/2024 – PRESENT)
Designed and built a full-stack task management web application using React
(Vite), Tailwind CSS, and Node.js with Express & MongoDB.
Implemented secure user authentication and authorization using JWT and
protected routes with frontend route guards and backend middleware.
Developed robust CRUD functionality for task operations, with features such
as status toggling, due date tracking, and input validation.
Integrated task statistics dashboard, auto-overdue detection, and smart
filtering to enhance productivity tracking.
Designed and enforced scalable backend architecture with modular
controllers, middleware, and model relationships, ensuring clean and
maintainable codebase.
